title: galium viscosum var. flavovirens
intro: Galium viscosum var. flavovirens, also known as the sticky galium or yellow-green sticky bedstraw, is a perennial plant species in the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Galium viscosum var. flavovirens include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting the body's natural defense against infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and skin conditions.
